title: puna subterranea
intro: Puna subterranea, also known as the underground puna or subterranean puna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and support the healing of wounds. Puna subterranea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its potential health benefits and medicinal properties.
